scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/js dist/assests && cp index.html style.css logo-glitch.css morph-menu.css master-logo.svg favicon.svg robots.txt sitemap.xml dist/ && cp assests/*.webp assests/*.mp3 dist/assests/ && cp js/*.js dist/js/ && cp audio-logo.js dist/ && echo '✅ Build complete'
